title: [BodyHealthAddon] LocationalArmorAddon
description: An addon for my BodyHealth plugin that adds locational armor
body:
**This is a [BodyHealth](https://modrinth.com/plugin/bodyhealth) addon, not a standalone plugin!**
It needs to go in `plugins/BodyHealth/addons/`, not `plugins/`! This addon reverse-engineers Minecraft's damage reduction logic to some degree and lets you alter it to, for example, only apply damage reduction from armor that visually covers the affected body part.
